summary: Gate M reviewed the L1 prototype pipeline activation proposal and passed. Phase 9 is authorized only for a deterministic local_tool builder that turns a local idea spec into a locally served prototype artifact with validation evidence.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Phase 9 local prototype pipeline implementation. Do not attach real providers, deploy, PR creation, external repos, auth, payments, multitenancy, Web Console, or IDE extension in this slice.
notes: Gate M authorizes only local_tool prototype generation.
Gate N must review generated prototype evidence before any provider or deploy activation.
